meta.intent: Examine integrated water rescue order by requiring the lower exposed puppy before the safer upper puppy.
meta.expectedPath: Identify the lower water-threatened target first, clear its crate-and-ice route, make one dock-safe stabilizing pivot, then finish the safer upper target.
meta.expectedFailMode: Generic clearing or wrong rescue order loses water tempo before the lower rescue is secured, with dock overflow as the secondary fair mistake.
meta.whatItProves: The water-rescue-order band can require disciplined priority reading under blocker and dock pressure without adding new mechanics.
meta.notes: Role: exam. Density sits in the late-level target band; assistance is lower than the preceding pressure-choice level so the authored order carries the proof.
